mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM artifacts WHERE id IN
#{id}
mapper.select:
SELECT a.*, COALESCE(( SELECT GROUP_CONCAT( DISTINCT COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(da.purpose), ''), NULLIF(TRIM(da.instrument_name), ''), CONCAT('检测分析#', da.id)) ORDER BY da.id SEPARATOR ' / ' ) FROM detection_analysis da WHERE ( ( da.artifact_code IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(da.artifact_code) <> '' AND ( (a.new_artifact_code IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(a.new_artifact_code) <> '' AND REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(TRIM(da.artifact_code), '：', ':'), ' ', ''), '-', ''), '_', '') = REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(TRIM(a.new_artifact_code), '：', ':'), ' ', ''), '-', ''), '_', '')) OR (a.original_artifact_code IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(a.original_artifact_code) <> '' AND REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(TRIM(da.artifact_code), '：', ':'), ' ', ''), '-', ''), '_', '') = REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(TRIM(a.original_artifact_code), '：', ':'), ' ', ''), '-', ''), '_', '')) ) ) OR ( (da.artifact_code IS NULL OR TRIM(da.artifact_code) = '') AND da.artifact_name IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(da.artifact_name) <> '' AND ( (a.new_artifact_name IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(a.new_artifact_name) <> '' AND TRIM(da.artifact_name) = TRIM(a.new_artifact_name)) OR (a.original_artifact_name IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(a.original_artifact_name) <> '' AND TRIM(da.artifact_name) = TRIM(a.original_artifact_name)) ) ) ) ), '无') AS testing_status_display FROM artifacts a
AND new_artifact_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{newArtifactName}, '%')
AND new_artifact_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{newArtifactCode}, '%')
AND material1 LIKE CONCAT('%', #{material1}, '%')
AND excavation_relic LIKE CONCAT('%', #{excavationRelic}, '%')
AND completeness LIKE CONCAT('%', #{completeness}, '%')
ORDER BY CAST(a.serial_number AS UNSIGNED) ASC
